items.title: Billionaire Lex Wexner tells US lawmakers he was 'naive' and 'conned' by Epstein
items.description: Testifying before Congress, the former CEO of Victoria's Secret lingerie brand accused Epstein of stealing "vast sums" of money from his family.

items.title: Do not give away Diego Garcia, Trump tells UK in fresh attack on Chagos deal
items.description: The president's comments come just a day after the US gave its official backing to the UK's Chagos deal.

items.title: 'Difficult' Russia-Ukraine peace talks end without breakthrough
items.description: The second day of negotiations between Ukraine and Russia ended after just two hours.

items.title: Zuckerberg defends Meta in landmark social media addiction trial
items.description: The billionaire chief executive faces is questioned over whether use of Instagram harms children.

items.title: Iran security official appears to fire on crowd at cemetery
items.description: It happened as people gathered to commemorate those killed during the government’s brutal crackdown on protesters
